acceptance_criteria: Action Queue rows render Act now when resolver capability is present.
Clicking Act now invokes a protected backend resolver route.
Resolver handles signing URL success, insufficient scope, not-ready, no-url, rate-limited, malformed, and source-unavailable states.
Completed rows continue to expose View only when durable sourceOpenUrl exists.
No direct Adobe action URL is persisted in read models, fixtures, logs, or telemetry.
OAuth scope insufficiency produces explicit reconnect behavior.
Required tests and validations pass with lockfile md5 unchanged.
Final closeout includes changed files, validation outputs, exclusions, residual risks, and recommended next action.
